CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-21-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Margaret Del Coto, CSR #8493. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2003 Continued To May-20-03 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Claim Of Minor
Off Calendar Jan-17-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Calendar error - duplicate entry.

Minor'S Compromise In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On January 16, 2003.
Off Calendar Jan-17-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Janet Pond; Bailiff: P. Burt. Lawrence Organ, Esq. appeared on behalf of the plaintiff. Plaintiff and minor now reside in Italy. Court excuses their appearance. Based on evidence received, the Court grants compromise as follows: Compromise: $4,000.00; Costs: $203.00 and the balance of $3,797.00 to be deposited into a blocked account until minor's 18th birthday. Counsel to present order for Court's signature.
